summary: Comprehensive testing of Blendlink Casino System (Iteration 12) completed. All 32 backend API tests passed (100%). All 7 casino games tested via UI: Slots, Blackjack, Roulette, Wheel of Fortune, Video Poker, Baccarat, Craps. Casino stats and history pages working correctly. Fixed backend bug: Video Poker draw endpoint was missing Query parameter annotations causing 422 errors.
passed_tests: Backend: All casino endpoints require authentication (401) - 9 tests
Backend: POST /api/casino/slots/spin - Spins slots with valid bet, returns reels, winnings, balance
Backend: POST /api/casino/slots/spin - Validates bet limits (min 10, max 10000)
Backend: POST /api/casino/blackjack/start - Starts game, returns player hand, dealer showing, actions
Backend: POST /api/casino/blackjack/action - Hit action adds card to hand
Backend: POST /api/casino/blackjack/action - Stand action resolves game with dealer hand
Backend: POST /api/casino/roulette/spin - Red/Black/Odd bets work correctly
Backend: POST /api/casino/wheel/spin - Returns segment, multiplier, winnings
Backend: POST /api/casino/poker/deal - Deals 5 cards, returns game_id
Backend: POST /api/casino/poker/draw - FIXED: Now accepts query params correctly
Backend: POST /api/casino/baccarat/play - Player/Banker/Tie bets work
Backend: POST /api/casino/craps/roll - Pass/Don't Pass/Field/Any Seven bets work
Backend: GET /api/casino/stats - Returns games played, total wagered, total won, net profit
Backend: GET /api/casino/history - Returns game history with bet amounts and results
Backend: GET /api/casino/leaderboard - Returns leaderboard data
Backend: Balance updates correctly after wins/losses
Backend: Insufficient balance error handled correctly
Frontend: Casino page loads at /casino with all 7 game options visible
Frontend: User balance displays correctly in header (12,087 BL)
Frontend: Slots game - spin with bet, reels animate, result shows, balance updates
Frontend: Blackjack game - deal cards, hit/stand/double actions work
Frontend: Roulette game - select bet type, spin wheel, result shows (30 RED), balance updates
Frontend: Wheel of Fortune - spin with bet, wheel animates, multiplier result shows (5x), balance updates
Frontend: Video Poker - deal cards, hold cards selection, draw works, hand evaluation shows
Frontend: Baccarat - bet on player/banker/tie, cards dealt, winner determined (BANKER WINS)
Frontend: Craps - select bet type, roll dice (4+6=10), result shows (Point is 10), balance updates
Frontend: Casino stats page shows games played (42), total wagered (2,360), total won (3,575), net profit (+1,215)
Frontend: Casino history shows recent games with bet amounts and results
Frontend: Back navigation from game to casino lobby works
Frontend: Bet amount controls (+ and - buttons) work correctly
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED: Backend casino_system.py poker/draw endpoint was missing Query annotations for game_id and hold parameters, causing 422 validation errors. Added 'from fastapi import Query' and updated function signature.
All 7 casino games (Slots, Blackjack, Roulette, Video Poker, Baccarat, Craps, Wheel of Fortune) are fully functional
Provably fair random number generation implemented using server_seed + client_seed + nonce hashing
Bet limits enforced correctly (Min 10 BL, Max 10,000 BL)
Balance updates correctly after each game - deducted on bet, added on win
Game history recorded in casino_history collection with all relevant details
Stats aggregation working correctly with MongoDB pipeline
All game components have proper data-testid attributes for testing
UI shows appropriate win/loss feedback with color coding (green for wins, red for losses)
seed_data_creation: Casino game history created during testing (42 games played)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Casino system fully tested and working. All 7 games (Slots, Blackjack, Roulette, Video Poker, Baccarat, Craps, Wheel of Fortune) functional. Stats and history endpoints working. Fixed poker/draw endpoint Query parameter issue. Test user has ~12,087 BL coins and 42 games in history. No mocked APIs - all games use real BL coin transactions.
